love to use.

A small studio crafting premium iPhone apps for cooking, calm and play. Private by design, offline first — and obsessed with the details.

Why these apps

Small studio. High standards.

Every app follows the same four principles — no exceptions.

Crafted, not assembled

Every app is designed and built end-to-end with obsessive attention to typography, motion and detail. No templates, no shortcuts.

Private by design

No accounts, no tracking, no data harvesting. Your data lives on your device — where it belongs.

Offline first

Airplane mode is not an edge case. Every app works fully without an internet connection, every day.

Honest pricing

Free where possible, a fair one-time purchase or simple upgrade where not. Never dark patterns.

Privacy first

Your data stays yours.
Full stop.

We build apps the way we wish all apps were built: no accounts to create, no analytics watching over your shoulder, no data leaving your device. Each app page explains exactly what it does — and doesn’t — do.

Read the privacy overview
BreathWell No data collected. No ads, no analytics, no account — everything stays on your device. Kamado Companion All data stays on your device. No account, no analytics. Free and supported by ads. Airfryer Companion No data collected. No ads, no analytics, no account — your cooks stay on your device. Sudoku XL No data collected. No account, no analytics — progress and statistics stay on your device. Meal Planner No data collected. No ads, no analytics, no account — plans and pantry stay on your device.

Questions

Good to know

The short version of what people ask most. Each app also has its own detailed FAQ.

All questions
Are the apps free?

Most apps are free to download and use. Some offer an optional Pro upgrade — always clearly priced, never required for core functionality.

Do the apps collect my data?

No. None of our apps include analytics or tracking SDKs, and none require an account. Your data is stored on your device only.

Do the apps work offline?

Yes — every app is built offline-first. Recipes, sessions, puzzles and timers all work without an internet connection.

Which devices are supported?

All apps are designed for iPhone and require iOS 17 or later (Meal Planner requires iOS 26). Several are localized in English and Dutch.
